query_metadata.original_query: can you give me the details about the patient who has diabetes and what medications is he/she is on and names

response.message: Successfully retrieved details of patients with diabetes and their medications.
response.query_understanding: Retrieve details of patients diagnosed with diabetes and list the medications they are on.
response.sql_query:
SELECT DISTINCT patients."PATIENT_ID", patients."FIRST", patients."LAST", patients."GENDER", patients."BIRTHDATE", patients."ADDRESS", patients."CITY", patients."STATE", patients."ZIP", medications."MEDICATION_DESCRIPTION" 
FROM patients 
INNER JOIN conditions ON patients."PATIENT_ID" = conditions."PATIENT_ID"
INNER JOIN medications ON patients."PATIENT_ID" = medications."PATIENT_ID"
WHERE conditions."CONDITION_DESCRIPTION" ILIKE '%diabetes%'
LIMIT 10;

metadata.reasoning: Joined the patients table with conditions and medications to filter patients diagnosed with diabetes and retrieve their medication details.
